questions.question: What is the GL Hub Software Development Kit (GL Hub SDK)?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides an overview of the GL Hub SDK, stating that it is a software development kit released by GenesysLogic Inc. in late 2022 to allow vendors to develop applications for GL Hub devices.

questions.question: What are the main features and functionalities of the GL Hub SDK?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the main features of the GL Hub SDK, including querying Hub information, sending vendor commands, and updating firmware.

questions.question: What are the steps to use the GL Hub SDK?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides the steps to use the GL Hub SDK, including including the header file, linking the library and DLL, and ensuring the device filter driver is installed.
